headline: Rollins (ROL) Q1 Earnings Match Estimates
summary: Rollins (ROL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +1.22% and +1.27%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
